mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( store_id, order_no, platform_order_number, platform_type, order_status, total_amount, commission_amount, coupon_cost, delivery_fee, platform_support_amount, total_menu_cost, total_packaging_fee, net_profit, total_cooking_time, delivery_address, ordered_at, cooking_started_at, completed_at, canceled_at, refunded_at ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{orderNo}, #{platformOrderNumber}, #{platformType}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{commissionAmount}, #{couponCost}, #{deliveryFee}, #{platformSupportAmount}, #{totalMenuCost}, #{totalPackagingFee}, #{netProfit}, #{totalCookingTime}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{orderedAt}, #{cookingStartedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{canceledAt}, #{refundedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, store_id, platform_order_number, order_no, platform_type, order_status, total_amount, commission_amount, coupon_cost, delivery_fee, platform_support_amount, total_menu_cost, total_packaging_fee, net_profit, total_cooking_time, delivery_address, ordered_at, cooking_started_at, completed_at, canceled_at, refunded_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM orders
WHERE id = #{id} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.platform_order_number, o.platform_type, o.order_status, o.total_amount, o.net_profit, o.total_cooking_time, o.delivery_address, o.ordered_at, o.cooking_started_at, o.canceled_at,
order_request.request_text AS request_text, order_request.risk_type AS request_risk_type, order_request.risk_level AS request_risk_level, order_request.analysis_message AS request_analysis_message,
order_cancellation.cancel_type AS cancel_type, order_cancellation.cancel_reason AS cancel_reason,
COALESCE(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(item_summary.item_count, 0) = 0 THEN '-'
WHEN item_summary.item_count = 1 THEN first_item.ordered_menu_name
ELSE CONCAT( first_item.ordered_menu_name, ' 외 ', item_summary.item_count - 1, '개' ) END AS menu_summary
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity, COUNT(*) AS item_count, MIN(id) AS first_item_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id ) item_summary ON item_summary.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_items first_item ON first_item.id = item_summary.first_item_id
LEFT JOIN order_requests order_request ON order_request.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_cancellations order_cancellation ON order_cancellation.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
AND o.platform_type = #{platformType}
AND o.order_status = #{orderStatus}
ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC, o.id DESC

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.platform_order_number, o.platform_type, o.order_status, o.total_amount, o.net_profit, o.total_cooking_time, o.delivery_address, o.ordered_at, o.cooking_started_at, o.canceled_at,
order_request.request_text AS request_text, order_request.risk_type AS request_risk_type, order_request.risk_level AS request_risk_level, order_request.analysis_message AS request_analysis_message,
order_cancellation.cancel_type AS cancel_type, order_cancellation.cancel_reason AS cancel_reason,
COALESCE(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(item_summary.item_count, 0) = 0 THEN '-'
WHEN item_summary.item_count = 1 THEN first_item.ordered_menu_name
ELSE CONCAT( first_item.ordered_menu_name, ' 외 ', item_summary.item_count - 1, '개' ) END AS menu_summary
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity, COUNT(*) AS item_count, MIN(id) AS first_item_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id ) item_summary ON item_summary.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_items first_item ON first_item.id = item_summary.first_item_id
LEFT JOIN order_requests order_request ON order_request.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_cancellations order_cancellation ON order_cancellation.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.ordered_at >= #{businessStartAt} AND o.ordered_at < #{businessEndAt}
AND o.platform_type = #{platformType}
AND o.order_status = #{orderStatus}
ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC, o.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS today_order_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ( 'WAITING', 'COOKING', 'DELIVERING' ) THEN 1 END ) AS progress_order_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 END ) AS waiting_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COOKING' THEN 1 END ) AS cooking_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'DELIVERING' THEN 1 END ) AS delivering_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END ) AS completed_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 END ) AS canceled_count,
COALESCE( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) AS today_sales,
COALESCE( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(o.net_profit, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) AS today_net_profit,
COALESCE( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ( 'WAITING', 'COOKING', 'DELIVERING' ) THEN COALESCE(o.net_profit, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) AS expected_progress_net_profit,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ( 'WAITING', 'COOKING', 'DELIVERING' ) AND ( order_request.risk_level IN ( 'CAUTION', 'WARNING', 'DANGER' ) OR order_request.risk_type IN ( 'ALLERGY', 'DISPUTE', 'EXCESSIVE' ) ) THEN 1 END ) AS request_risk_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ( 'WAITING', 'COOKING', 'DELIVERING' ) AND COALESCE(o.net_profit, 0) <= 0 THEN 1 END ) AS loss_risk_count
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_requests order_request ON order_request.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.ordered_at >= #{businessStartAt} AND o.ordered_at < #{businessEndAt}
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
SET order_status = #{nextStatus},
cooking_started_at = CASE WHEN #{nextStatus} = 'COOKING' AND cooking_started_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE cooking_started_at END,
completed_at = CASE WHEN #{nextStatus} = 'COMPLETED' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_at END,
canceled_at = CASE WHEN #{nextStatus} = 'CANCELED' THEN NOW() ELSE canceled_at END,
refunded_at = CASE WHEN #{nextStatus} = 'REFUNDED' THEN NOW() ELSE refunded_at END,
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND order_status = #{currentStatus} AND deleted_at IS NULL
